Hero.title: ZOOMA
Hero.subtitle: The smart one seizes the opportunity! At ZOOMA, we've gathered web developers, social media and brand identity designers, and Google Maps specialists... all in one place! Instead of dealing with multiple agencies, we combined everything you need to upgrade your store. Jordan is embracing this digital evolution, be among the first!

Package.title: The Strongest and Best-Selling Package Now
Package.subtitle: Catch the commercial stores offer! Whatever your store is, the 35 piasters package keeps you up to date and increases your income. The subscription gives you:
Package.tagline: Save your spare change every day (35 piasters)
Package.validity_note: Note: This offer is for a very limited time
Package.cta: Order the Service Now from ZOOMA

features.f1: Website design showcasing your business, products, services, and prices
features.f2: Social media post designs upon request (10 per month)
features.f3: Adding your location to Google Maps to appear in searches
features.f4: Receive customer orders directly via WhatsApp or any app you choose when they order from the website
features.f5: A plastic QR stand placed in your store for customers to scan, containing the website, menu, and products
features.f6: Brand identity design and custom cards introducing your store and website
features.f7: Technical support throughout the subscription period
